changes: 月神之眼被动印记伤害：15(10%额外攻击力)→15(15%额外攻击力)
changesEn: Moonlight Vigil mark damage: 15 (10% bonus AD) → 15 (15% bonus AD)
Calibrum Q volley damage: 19/24.25/29.5/34.75/40% total AD → 20/25.25/30.5/35.75/41% total AD
Severum Q shadow crescent damage: 20-110 (10-16% bonus AD) → 20-110 (15-21% bonus AD)
Gravitum Q sentry damage: 35-125 (30-48% bonus AD) → 35-125 (34-52% bonus AD)

changes: 被动-旅行者的呼唤单个精灵伤害：35(每5钟灵+10)(+40%法术强度)→30(每5钟灵+6)(+40%法术强度)
changesEn: Passive - Traveler's Call spirit damage: 35 (+10 per 5 chimes)(+40% AP) → 30 (+6 per 5 chimes)(+40% AP)
Passive - Blaze detonation damage: 8-12% (levels 1-17) → 6-12% (levels 1-18, keeps scaling past 18)

changes: R-旋转飞斧对英雄伤害衰减：命中每人-8%(最低40%)→命中每人-5%(最低50%)
changesEn: R - Whirling Death damage falloff vs champions: -8% per hit (min 40%) → -5% per hit (min 50%)
Q - Undertow bonus damage to monsters: 20/35/50/65/80 → 20/45/70/95/120
Q - Hammer Shock max damage to monsters: 50/80/110/140/170 → 75/105/135/165/195
Q - Elemental Wrath damage to monsters: 155% → 175%

changes: E-撕咬/钻地额外真实伤害：125%→120%
changesEn: E - Furious Bite/Unburrow physical damage: 80/108/136/164/192 (64% bonus AD) → 70/95/120/145/170 (60% bonus AD)
E - Furious Bite/Unburrow bonus true damage: 125% → 120%

changes: 被动-救赎掉落几率(赛娜击杀)：10%→5%
被动-救赎掉落几率(队友击杀)：28%→32%
被动-救赎暴击伤害惩罚：-10%→-15%
Q-灵魂萃取冷却缩减触发方式：命中即触发→普攻命中触发
changesEn: Q - Piercing Darkness cooldown refund trigger: on cast hit → on basic attack hit

changes: R-暗影冲击技能重置窗口：6秒→8秒
changesEn: R - Shadow Surge takedown reset window: 6s → 8s

changes: 合成路径：爆裂魔杖(850金)+帆布镜(900金)+650金→增幅典籍(400金)+帆布镜(900金)+增幅典籍(400金)+700金
唯一被动-控制：控制类技能+15技能急速→+20技能急速
唯一被动-号令：致命一击造成6%易伤→7%易伤
changesEn: Build path: Blasting Wand (850g) + Bandleglass Mirror (900g) + 650g → Amplifying Tome (400g) + Bandleglass Mirror (900g) + Amplifying Tome (400g) + 700g
Unique - Coordinate: immobilizing spells grant +15 ability haste → +20 ability haste
Unique - Command: takedowns apply 6% Vulnerable → 7% Vulnerable

systemChanges: 补刀提示：Normal Draft 和 排位赛开启（排位默认关闭，可手动开启）
5v5排位：6月26日晚8点回归，含锦标赛征召模式、双倍积分和专属奖励
私信举报：聊天界面新增举报功能，用于处理私信骚扰
Discord 账号绑定：支持地区可绑定账号，加速组队
systemChangesEn: CS ping: enabled in Normal Draft and Ranked (off by default in Ranked, can be turned on manually)
5v5 Ranked: returns June 26 at 8pm, with Clash-style team sign-ups, double LP gains, and exclusive rewards
DM reporting: added a report button in direct-message chat to handle DM harassment
Discord account linking: supported regions can link accounts to speed up grouping

mayhem.summaryZh: 本次更新延续近期多个热修复的方向，持续打磨新老海克斯增强之间的平衡。近期热修复已经显著改善了技能类增强的分配逻辑——现在这些增强只会出现在真正契合该英雄技能的强化项上，并修复了部分技能错误获得不兼容增强的问题；也修复了「珠光护手」「关键暴击」这类暴击相关增强出现概率偏低的bug；同时修复了第三、四海克斯栏位里技能类增强出现率被大幅压低的问题。过去一周还在持续调整新增强强度——「大魔导师」「博学者」这类偏强的选项被削弱，「玻璃大炮」「大头针垫」这类偏弱的选项得到加强与手感优化。海克斯大乱斗团队会持续关注增强强度和玩家反馈，让大乱斗保持新鲜、平衡、有趣。
mayhem.summaryEn: Hello ARAMers! In this patch, along with several recent hotfixes, we're continuing our work to create a healthier balance between new and existing Augments. Recent hotfixes already improved how skill-based Augments get distributed — they now only show up on abilities they actually synergize with, and we fixed cases where the wrong ability could roll an incompatible Augment. We also fixed crit-related Augments like Jeweled Gauntlet and It's Critical showing up less often than intended, and fixed skill-based Augments being under-weighted in the third and fourth Augment slots. Over the past week we kept tuning individual Augment strength — overperformers like Archmage and Tooth Fairy got toned down, while underperformers like Glass Cannon and Pin Cushion got buffed and had their feel polished. The ARAM Mayhem team will keep watching Augment power levels and player feedback to keep Mayhem fresh, balanced, and fun.

augmentChanges.name: 居高临下 (From Down Town)
augmentChanges.change: 限制了最大范围的施法距离

augmentChanges.name: 玻璃大炮 (Glass Cannon)
augmentChanges.change: 真实伤害比例：15%→25%(近战)/15%(远程，未变)

augmentChanges.name: 高压锅 (Pressure Cooker)
augmentChanges.change: 总燃烧伤害：2%最大生命值→1.5%最大生命值
augmentChanges.changeEn: Total burn damage: 2% max health → 1.5% max health

augmentChanges.name: 虚空湮灭 (Void Immolation)
augmentChanges.change: 新增被动「荒芜」：击杀敌人后在其周围造成魔法伤害
augmentChanges.changeEn: New passive "Desolation": takedowns burn the area around the target for magic damage

bugfixes: 修复了「史上最大雪球」对目标造成双倍伤害的bug
修复了残血伤害计算错误的bug
修复了两名玩家互相「拍拍肩膀」可能导致护盾无限叠加的bug
bugfixesEn: Fixed Biggest Snowball Ever dealing double damage to its target
Fixed a bug in how low-health damage was calculated
Fixed two players Pat Pat-ing each other, which could stack shields infinitely
